case_title: CITRON, LESLIE VS SHELL DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION C/O MICHAEL COSMIN- et al

docket_entries.description: COPY OF DOMESTIC RETURN RECEIPT SENT TO PLTF. PER WRITTEN REQUEST.
